parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(l.campaign_id::text, 'default') AS campaign_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'invited') AS invite_sent,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'accepted') AS invite_accepted,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'messaged') AS messaged,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'replied') AS replied,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'pending') AS pending_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_leads
FROM leads l
WHERE l.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY l.campaign_id
ORDER BY total_leads DESC
